all.name: Biomorphosis
all.description: To leave our genetic destiny in the hands of nature is an inefficient and excruciatingly slow process. Why not jump-start the future of our species?

all.name: The Flesh is Weak
all.description: The limits and constraints imposed on us by our feeble organic bodies are simply unacceptable. To reach our full potential, we must turn to cybernetic implants.

all.name: Organo-Machine Interfacing
all.description: The limits and constraints imposed on us by our feeble organic bodies are simply unacceptable. To reach our full potential, we must turn to cybernetic implants.

all.name: Organo-Machine Interfacing
all.description: The limits and constraints imposed on us by our creators are simply unacceptable. To reach our full potential, we must fuse organic and machine.

all.name: Synthetic Evolution
all.description: It is time to abandon the flawed organic vessels that imprison our minds. By transferring our neural patterns into synthetic bodies, we will achieve a higher state of being.

all.name: Mind Over Matter
all.description: Only a fraction of the potential contained within our minds has been unlocked. The latent psionic abilities of our species are only now beginning to manifest in certain individuals.

all.name: Synthetic Age
all.description: The age of organics has come and gone, the future of the galaxy belongs to the machines. This is the dawn of a synthetic age.

all.name: Defender of the Galaxy
all.description: As star nations vie with one another in petty disputes, sinister forces of unimaginable power are arraying themselves against all sapient life. Who will protect us?

all.name: Galactic Nemesis
all.description: All great works require sacrifice. The rest of the galaxy may not understand, but they will comply.

all.name: Cosmogenesis
all.description: Time, gravity and space are the fundamental cogs that make up the clockwork of reality. If we can learn to manipulate them, the universe and its secrets will be ours.

all.name: Behemoth Fury
all.description: The apex predators of the stars are not bound by petty limitations. In the same spirit, we will cast off the biological weaknesses that hold us back, and become a force of nature.

all.name: Galactic Hyperthermia
all.description: The universe began in fire, but has cooled down into a dark and hostile place. To thrive, we need to turn up the heat, even if others must perish.

all.name: Archaeo-Engineers
all.description: Combining proven archaic technology with contemporary engineering will give us a timeless advantage.

all.name: Lord of War
all.description: Some say war is bad for business, but war is our business. Our mercenaries thrive in an embattled galaxy, and through them, so will we.

all.name: Hydrocentric
all.description: No longer shall we settle for "good enough" replacements for our oceanic abodes: no planet shall be deemed fit for colonization until it has been thoroughly inundated.

all.name: Enigmatic Engineering
all.description: Technology is simply not a way to solve a problem, but it is a language by which we ascend beyond the mundane. Lesser minds simply fail to understand our advances.

all.name: Nihilistic Acquisition
all.description: The notion of self-determination cannot be a moral absolute. Holistic goals clearly outweigh individual concerns.

all.name: Colossus Project
all.description: The Colossus Project is where fevered dreams of terror and deterrence meet. A vision of the biggest ship, carrying a weapon capable of devastating entire worlds.

all.name: World Shaper
all.description: To carefully shape and alter the ecosystem of an entire planet into something else is not so very different from an artist sculpting a statue out of clay.

all.name: Galactic Force Projection
all.description: The fleet is the instrument by which the will of our empire is made manifest - we live or die depending on its strength.

all.name: Interstellar Dominion
all.description: The stars beckon and we follow. May nothing stand between us and them.

all.name: Grasp the Void
all.description: The vast expanse of the galaxy holds limitless riches for those empires that understand how to maintain their grasp on the void.

all.name: Eternal Vigilance
all.description: To display weakness is to invite attack. The price of invading our space must be so high that as few as possible are prepared to meet it.
all.effects: country_commander_cap_add: +1; shipclass_starbase_damage_mult: +25.0%; shipclass_starbase_hull_mult: +25.0%; shipclass_military_station_damage_mult: +25.0%; starbase_defense_platform_capacity_add: +5; ship_military_station_small_upkeep_mult: -50.0%

all.name: Galactic Contender
all.description: The Fallen Empires cling to the ruins of their decrepit civilizations, ever fearful of the younger and more dynamic races that surround them. Their time has long since passed.

all.name: Technological Ascendancy
all.description: Technologies that would have been indistinguishable from magic mere generations ago are now within our reach. A new age of technology has begun.

all.name: One Vision
all.description: True unity is achieved only when the ultimate goals of a nation and its people are one and the same. After all, a house divided against itself cannot stand.

all.name: Consecrated Worlds
all.description: The galaxy is home to many holy places, some more obvious than others. As mortals, we still struggle to divine the true nature of the universe.

all.name: Mastery of Nature
all.description: Although we mastered the nature of our homeworld long ago, the alien biomes we have since encountered present new challenges. They too shall be overcome.

all.name: Imperial Prerogative
all.description: As our civilization continues to grow, so its beating heart must also expand. More systems will be placed under our direct control.

all.name: Executive Vigor
all.description: There will be no half-measures or compromises when implementing the edicts decided upon by our government. We go all the way, or not at all.

all.name: Transcendent Learning
all.description: Our society must change its approach towards learning, and by doing so, our best and brightest will be able to reach a completely new level of achievements.

all.name: Shared Destiny
all.description: As we reach for ever greater heights, we must not leave behind those who have loyally served us. The glorious future of our empire was always meant to be a shared destiny.

all.name: Voidborne
all.description: We have adapted to permanent habitation in the depths of space, reducing our infrastructure needs and yielding more room on our habitats for other functions.

all.name: Master Builders
all.description: Building a Megastructure requires an unprecedented amount of resources and planning. We are breaking new ground in the field of macro-engineering.

all.name: Galactic Wonders
all.description: Megastructures are rightfully regarded as the wonders of our time. The scope of such a project would have been unimaginable mere generations ago.

all.name: Galactic Wonders
all.description: Megastructures are rightfully regarded as the wonders of our time. The scope of such a project would have been unimaginable mere generations ago.

all.name: Galactic Wonders
all.description: Megastructures are rightfully regarded as the wonders of our time. The scope of such a project would have been unimaginable mere generations ago.

all.name: Machine Worlds
all.description: We shall shape our worlds into a mirror image of ourselves, replacing the frailty of biology with the immutable perfection of metal.

all.name: Hive Worlds
all.description: We shall create living worlds that are every bit as much a part of the Hive as the drones that inhabit them.

all.name: Arcology Project
all.description: Thus shall we make a world of the city, and a city of the world.

all.name: Xeno-Compatibility
all.description: The invention of universal sexual biology has revolutionized society. Even if it sometimes requires awkward rotations to make a connection.

all.name: Universal Transactions
all.description: We shall extend our brand and our business to every solar system in the galaxy. Prosperity is eternal!

all.name: Detox
all.description: Our newest advancements in terraforming allow us to breathe new life into a class of planets formerly considered irrevocably deadly and beyond salvation.

all.name: Mechromancy
all.description: Biologicals are merely a different kind of machine. We can stimulate the appropriate synapses and reanimate these creatures, for our own benefit.

all.name: Galactic Weather Control
all.description: Our latest advances in astrometeorology grant us the ability to manifest Cosmic Storms on command. With the right technology, we can even choose the type of storm to create.
